channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: New UK school allergy requirements introduced following Benedict Blythe's death
item.description: The UK government has announced a series of new school allergy safety measures, known as Benedict's Law, following the death of five-year-old Benedict Blythe in December 2021 after he was accidentally...

item.title: Nigel Farage's Ethics Investigation and Reform UK's Electoral Challenges
item.description: Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, is under scrutiny for an ethics investigation following revelations he accepted £5 million (US$6.7 million) from a British cryptocurrency investor before the 2024 el...

item.title: Local MSP Opposes Nuclear Plant in Fife Amid UK Government Plans
item.description: A new UK Government report has identified Fife as a potential site for a nuclear power plant, but a local MSP has strongly opposed the idea. The report, titled 'Potential future nuclear power plant si...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Announces This World Cup Will Be His Last for Portugal
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has confirmed that the 20226 FIFA World Cup will be his final tournament for Portugal, marking the end of his international career. The 41-year-old, who became the first player to ap...

item.title: Moorabbin Weather Update: Access Issues and Solutions
item.description: The article discusses technical issues encountered when accessing the Moorabbin weather report, highlighting a bot detection system implemented by News Corp Australia. Readers experiencing access prob...

item.title: Limpopo man's all-meat diet sparks debate on health benefits and risks
item.description: A Limpopo man claims an all-meat diet reversed his health issues, but experts warn of potential risks. Cobus Kriel, 52, follows a carnivore diet consisting of meat, eggs, and animal fats, arguing it c...

item.title: Justin Brownlee ruled out of Gilas Pilipinas' FIBA World Cup Asian Qualifiers game against Australia due to multiple injuries
item.description: Justin Brownlee will not suit up for Gilas Pilipinas in its FIBA World Cup 2027 Asian Qualifiers road game against Australia after being ruled out because of multiple injuries. The Samahang Basketbol ...

item.title: NHA Raises Toll Tax on Islamabad-Lahore M-2 Motorway by 7%
item.description: The National Highway Authority (NHA) has announced a 7% increase in toll tax on the Islamabad-Lahore Motorway (M-2), effective until April 23, 2027. This adjustment, part of a concession agreement wit...

item.title: Review of 'Will You Fake Marry Me?' Episodes 1-5: JMFyang's Next-Gen Rom-Com in iWant Vertical Drama
item.description: The article reviews the first five episodes of the iWant vertical drama 'Will You Fake Marry Me?', starring JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith. The show, created by JMFyang, is described as a modern rom-com th...

item.title: CNN report covers guest list details and visuals from Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding coverage
item.description: The CNN Entertainment segment focuses on newly reported details surrounding the wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, with particular emphasis on the guest list and visual aspects of the event. Ac...

item.title: President Herzog Blesses Former Gaza Hostages at Wedding Ceremony
item.description: President Isaac Herzog and First Lady Michal Herzog attended the wedding of former Gaza hostages Sasha Troufanov and Sapir Cohen, marking a poignant moment of joy and reconciliation. The couple, abduc...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Insights for July 6, 2026
item.description: The article discusses Feng Shui predictions by Master Hanz Cua for July 6, 2026, focusing on energy flow and auspicious arrangements. It highlights how specific dates and placements can influence luck...

item.title: Police Leadership Review Calls for Fundamental Overhaul and Reform
item.description: A landmark independent review has warned that police leadership in England and Wales requires a fundamental overhaul due to systemic weaknesses in identifying and developing leaders. The Police Leader...

item.title: Trump shares manipulated image of Obamas on Air Force One with graffiti
item.description: President Donald Trump posted a falsified image of former President Barack Obama and his wife, Michelle Obama, waving before boarding an Air Force One covered with graffiti. The image includes the Dem...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly celebrate lavish wedding at Madison Square Garden with celebrity guests
item.description: The article reports on what is described as an extravagant wedding celebration for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, allegedly held at New York's Madison Square Garden before a guest list of more than 1,...

item.title: Ogoni stakeholders support dialogue with Nigerian government to resolve 33-year oil conflict
item.description: The Ogoni National Congress, convened under the Movement for the Survival of the Ogoni People (MOSOP), has expressed strong support for ongoing dialogue between the Nigerian government and the Ogoni p...

item.title: Mexico vs England World Cup 2026 Match Delayed Due to Weather
item.description: The highly anticipated Mexico vs England World Cup 2026 last-16 match faced significant delays due to severe weather conditions in Mexico City. Originally scheduled for 9pm EDT, the game was postponed...

item.title: Tanzania Olympic Committee Faces Leadership Dispute Over Election Results
item.description: The Tanzania Olympic Committee elections have sparked controversy as members disputed the announced results, leading to heightened security measures at the venue. The election chairperson declared out...

item.title: Princess of Wales reunites with family after completing Three Peaks Challenge for cancer charity
item.description: Catherine, Princess of Wales, has released a series of new photographs showing a family reunion following her completion of the Three Peaks Challenge, undertaken in support of the Royal Marsden Cancer...

item.title: OPEC+ approves August production quota increase as oil exports recover after Strait of Hormuz disruption
item.description: OPEC+ announced that seven of its member countries—Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, and Oman—have agreed to increase their combined oil production quotas by 188,000 barrels per...
